Precious Roots Amulet

Once in a while, the unit blinds 3 random enemies for 3 sec. Blinded enemy units miss with 50% chance. Additionally, the amulet owner and 2 random allies have their damage and fortitude increased by 20% for 3 sec and restore 15% of their max health.

Requirements: 98-100
